description: This pipeline applies thresholding to images. The main steps are applying thresholding and then filling holes in the thresholded image.

b8fcc86f-0ac5-429e-b88b-62548b1a9394.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
b8fcc86f-0ac5-429e-b88b-62548b1a9394.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
